text: 1.2 Sensors – Detailed Interface Specs FLIR Boson 640 (Thermal) Parameter Value Part Number 433-0006-02-00 (OEM, no shutter) Resolution 640x512, 12µm pixel Spectral Range 7.5-13.5µm (LWIR) Frame Rate 60Hz native (no rolling shutter) Interface USB 3.0 (Type-C) or CMOS parallel (8/14-bit) Power 1.2W (active) / 0.5W (standby) NEDT <50mK at f/1.0 (detects 0.05°C difference) Dynamic Range -40°C to +300°C (switchable gain) Interface details: Using GMSL2 (Maxim MAX9296) serializer for long cable runs (up to 15m) to gimbal electronics.
